description: Immutable trust-case catalog for parity-aware Studio transformations. Browser clients select a trustCaseId; the Orchestrator resolves the runtime and comparison semantics from this repo-owned catalog.

trustCases.title: Hello W0.2 default parity
trustCases.description: Default controlled parity case for the supported HELLOW02 COBOL slice.

environmentProfile.description: Generated Java executes inside the controlled build-test runner sandbox with no browser-authored environment variables.
